title: Fermented Apple Stir Fry
description: A savory and slightly sweet stir fry made with fermented ingredients and apple. This dish is perfect for adventurous eaters looking to try something new.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped fermented cabbage and cook until slightly browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced apple and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until tender.
If using, add the gooey honey and adventurous chili flakes and stir to combine.
Pour in the Chinese stir-fry sauce and stir to coat the vegetables.
Continue cooking for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot over rice or noodles, if desired.
